product_overview: PC Builder Hub is a web application for researching, building, and sharing PC builds with an integrated community forum and admin management tools. It provides a guided Build Wizard, component selection with benchmark scoring, user accounts, notifications, and admin controls for inventory and presets.
core_goals: Enable users to compose, evaluate, and save PC builds with live price and benchmark feedback
Provide a guided Build Wizard that recommends presets based on usage and budget
Host a community forum for posts, comments, likes, and reporting with user notifications
Expose admin tools for managing components, presets, users, and system configuration
Enforce role-based access and validation for production-ready data integrity

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account by providing name, username, email and password to access personalized features.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open registration form -> Fill name, username, email and password -> Submit registration -> See success toast and account created
Navigate to / -> Open registration form -> Fill with already-registered email or invalid email -> Submit registration -> See validation error message

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate using email/password or Google OAuth to access protected features and personalized UI.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open login form -> Fill email and password -> Submit login -> See navbar update with user info
Navigate to / -> Initiate Google OAuth -> Complete provider authentication -> See navbar update with user info
Navigate to / -> Open login form -> Fill incorrect password -> Submit login -> See authentication error message

features.name: PC Build System
features.description: Assemble components across categories to produce a build with total price and benchmark scores, then save the build.
user_flows: Navigate to /build -> Select a component category -> Select a component from the list -> See total price update automatically -> See Gaming, Working and Creative benchmark scores update -> Enter build name -> Save build -> See save success message
Navigate to /build -> Select components -> Attempt to save without entering a build name -> Submit save -> See validation error for missing build name

features.name: Build Wizard
features.description: Guided wizard that recommends a preset build based on selected usage type and budget tier, with the option to customize.
user_flows: Navigate to /plan -> Select usage type -> Select budget tier -> View recommended preset build with component details and reasons -> Choose to customize -> Navigate to /build to modify preset
Navigate to /plan -> Select usage type and budget -> Backend returns no matching preset or API error -> See message indicating no presets available or see error toast

features.name: Forum Posts
features.description: Create and interact with community posts including optional images and attached PC builds; like posts to show appreciation.
user_flows: Navigate to /forum -> Open new post flow -> Fill title, content and select category -> Optionally upload images and attach a PC build -> Submit post -> See new post listed in forum
Navigate to /forum -> Attempt to submit a new post while unauthenticated -> Submit post -> See authentication required prompt or error

features.name: Forum Comments
features.description: Add comments to forum posts and like comments to participate in discussions.
user_flows: Navigate to /forum -> Open a post detail view -> Type comment content -> Submit comment -> See comment appear under the post
Navigate to /forum -> Open a post detail view -> Submit an empty comment -> See validation error preventing submission

features.name: Report System
features.description: Report inappropriate posts or comments by selecting a reason and optionally adding a description; reports are submitted for moderation.
user_flows: Navigate to /forum -> Open a post or comment -> Initiate report flow -> Select reason and optionally add description -> Submit report -> See confirmation that report was submitted
Navigate to /forum -> Open a post or comment -> Initiate report flow -> Submit without selecting a reason -> See validation error requiring a reason

features.name: Notification System
features.description: Surface real-time notifications and allow users to view, navigate to targets, and mark notifications as read.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See notification badge with unread count -> Open notification dropdown -> Click a notification -> Navigate to notification target -> Mark notification as read -> See badge count decrease
Navigate to / -> Open notification dropdown while notifications API is unavailable -> See error message or empty state indicating notifications could not be loaded

features.name: Profile
features.description: Access account settings and saved builds from a protected profile area; edit and persist build changes tied to your account.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View saved builds and account settings -> Open a saved build -> Edit components or name -> Save changes -> See updated build persisted
Navigate to /profile while unauthenticated -> Attempt access -> See access denied or authentication prompt

features.name: Reset Password
features.description: Reset account password using token-validated flows to recover access.
user_flows: Navigate to /reset-password -> Enter valid reset token and new password -> Submit reset -> See success confirmation that password was updated
Navigate to /reset-password -> Enter expired or invalid token -> Submit reset -> See token invalid or expired error message

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin overview showing system statistics, activity charts, and recent reports to monitor platform health.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin as an administrator -> View total users, components, posts and builds counts -> View activity chart and latest reports -> Navigate via sidebar to another admin page
Navigate to /admin as a non-admin or unauthenticated user -> Attempt access -> See permission error or redirect to sign-in

features.name: Admin Hardware Inventory
features.description: Full CRUD management for component inventory with type-specific fields and server-side persistence.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/inventory as an administrator -> View list of components -> Filter by component type -> Open add component form -> Fill required component details including type-specific fields -> Submit create -> See new component appear in list
Navigate to /admin/inventory as an administrator -> Open add component form -> Submit with missing required fields -> See validation error and prevented save

features.name: Admin Preset Management
features.description: Create and manage recommended build presets used by the Build Wizard, including reasons and activation toggles.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/presets as an administrator -> Open add preset flow -> Select usage type and budget tier -> Select components from database -> Add reason for components -> Save preset -> See preset listed and active
Navigate to /admin/presets as an administrator -> Attempt to save preset without selecting components -> Submit -> See validation error preventing save

features.name: Admin System Configuration
features.description: Edit benchmark baselines, scoring weights and forum policies with real-time validation before saving critical changes.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/settings as an administrator -> View current baseline and weight values -> Edit weight values so they sum to 100% -> Observe green badge and enabled save -> Submit changes -> See confirmation

Navigate to /admin/settings as an administrator -> Edit weight values so they do not sum to 100% -> Observe red badge and disabled save -> Adjust values to sum to 100% -> Observe green badge and save enabled

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Manage user accounts, roles and statuses to enforce platform policies and moderate users.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users as an administrator -> View list of users -> Change a user's role -> See role updated and persisted -> Change a user's status to suspended -> See status updated
Navigate to /admin/users as a non-admin -> Attempt to change user role or status -> See permission error or blocked action

routes.description: Homepage with Hero banner, build steps, PC Component Guide slider
PC Build page where users select components and view benchmark scores
Build Wizard - step-by-step guide to choose usage and budget for recommended builds
Community forum with posts, comments, likes, and reporting
User profile page with saved builds and account settings
Password reset page with token validation
Admin dashboard with stats, graphs, reports summary
Admin preset build management for Build Wizard
System configuration for baselines, weights, forum policies

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register new account with email, username, and password
user_interactions: Click Sign Up button in Navbar
Fill name, username, email, password fields
See success toast or error message

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email/password or Google OAuth
user_interactions: Click Sign In button in Navbar
See Navbar update with user info on success

features.name: PC Build System
features.description: Select PC components across 8 categories and view benchmark scores
user_interactions: Click on component category (CPU, GPU, RAM, etc.)
Select a component from the modal list
See Gaming, Working, Creative benchmark scores

features.name: Build Wizard
features.description: Guided step-by-step wizard to recommend PC specs based on usage and budget
user_interactions: Select budget tier (Entry, Mid, Hi-End, Ultra)
View recommended preset build with component details and reasons
Click to customize in Build page
Click back button to change selections

features.name: Forum Posts
features.description: Create, view, like posts in community forum
user_interactions: Click on post to view details

features.name: Forum Comments
features.description: Add comments to forum posts and like comments

features.name: Report System
features.description: Report inappropriate posts or comments
user_interactions: Click report button on post or comment

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Overview statistics and system health for administrators
user_interactions: View total users, components, posts, builds counts
Navigate via sidebar to other admin pages

features.name: Admin Hardware Inventory
features.description: CRUD operations for PC components in database
user_interactions: Click Add button to open form
Fill component details (name, brand, price, specs)
See dynamic fields based on selected type (CPU shows socket, GPU shows vram)

features.name: Admin Preset Management
features.description: Manage recommended PC build presets for Build Wizard
user_interactions: Select usage type and budget tier

features.name: Admin System Configuration
features.description: Configure benchmark baselines, weights, and forum policies
user_interactions: View weight values with real-time sum validation
See green badge when weights sum to 100%
See red badge and disabled save when weights dont sum to 100%

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Manage user roles, status, and accounts

features.name: Notification System
features.description: Real-time notifications for users
user_interactions: See notification badge on navbar bell icon
Click notification to navigate to target
